message:
fix: align conservative defaults with production needs

- Command timeout: 10s → 120s for OpenAI/Gemini (matches Anthropic)
- Retry policy: MaxRetries 2 → 4 (transient failures need more attempts)
- Shell output: MaxLines 256 → 512 (complex builds were truncating)
- Anthropic max_tokens: 12288 → 16384 (matches model capability)

These were all "safe defaults" from the initial implementation that
diverged from optimal values without technical justification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
